name: metor-dev-tools
description: Metor is a Tor-based messenger framework written in Python.

scripts.format:py: python -m ruff format src/metor/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.lint: python -m ruff check --fix src/metor/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.ready: npm run format:py && npm run format:md && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run docs

author: LuRex
